top_signals.title: Policy paper: HM Treasury Market Engagement Group summary minutes – June 2026
top_signals.summary: A senior‑level forum for financial market participants to share their views on UK-related developments in financial markets, including gilts and sterling, and broader market themes with the Chancellor of the Exchequer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China Stock Gauge Heads for Bear Market as Tech Weakness Extends
top_signals.summary: A major Chinese stock gauge slid toward a bear market, pressured by weakness in Internet and consumer firms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines central bank hike rates to contain inflation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan’s Ward Says Buy European Stocks as Skepticism Lingers
top_signals.summary: It’s time to buy European stocks, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co. Asset Management’s Karen Ward.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tesco fuel sales drag up slowing growth
top_signals.summary: Tesco has revealed a nearly 20 per cent boost in fuel sales as the Iran war sends petrol prices soaring, dragging up otherwise slowing revenue. The FTSE 100 supermarket saw fuel sales jump by 19.5 per cent to £1.7bn in the three months to May, while total sales growth slowed to one per cent to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: You can buy AI software, but not years of AI development experience
top_signals.summary: Over the past two years, AI has moved from a specialist technology to a boardroom priority at remarkable speed. Today, almost every company can access powerful AI tools, whether through large language models, workflow automation or AI assistants integrated across different parts of the business. What is becoming increasingly clear, however, is that access to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
‘One of the most anti-crypto laws in the US’: Illinois Gov. Pritzker signs 0.2% crypto tax
top_signals.summary: Crypto industry lobbyists and representatives are speaking out against the Digital Asset Tax Act passed into law in Illinois on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Intellian Celebrates Opening of New California Manufacturing Campus
top_signals.summary: Intellian Technologies, a provider of satellite communication antennas and ground gateway solutions, announced the opening of its new manufacturing facility in California. Marking the company’s first large-scale international manufacturing campus…
